expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的木板尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 是总尺寸, [木板厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度, [背景板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah pengukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดบอร์ดสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบอร์ดบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบอร์ดหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay ang kabuuang Pagsukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Tabla, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Likurang Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အုပ်လစ်အတွက်ဘုတ်ရွက်အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်ပါသည်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth]မှာ ခွဲစိတ်အတိုင်းအတာ, [BoardThick] Top, Bottom နှင့် Side Board ပစ္စည်းအထူကိုဆိုလိုပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតួររបស់ក្តារសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺជាតួរទាំងមូល, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងលើ, ខាងក្រោម និងខាង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຂອງໄມ້ສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ແມ່ນຄວາມຄິດໄລ່ທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດສຸໃຊ້ໃນບອດຂ້າງຮຽບ, ໃນນະທີ່ [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນເຄື່ອງຄອບໃສ່ຂ້າງຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[幅], [高さ],[奥行] は総寸法で、[板厚] は上部、底部、側面板の材料厚さ、[背板厚さ] は背板の材料厚さ。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height],[Depth]는 총 측정치이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재질 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재질 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height],[Depth] es la medición total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height],[Depth] représente la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height],[Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height],[Depth] это общая мера, [BoardThick] это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
